task.label: Require that verification of the identity of the customer and the beneficial owner take place

conditions.condition: before the establishment of a business relationship or the carrying out of the transaction

task.label: Verify the identity of the customer and the beneficial owner

conditions.condition: before the establishment of a business relationship or the carrying out of the transaction

task.label: Allow verification of the identity of the customer and the beneficial owner to be completed during the establishment of a business relationship

conditions.condition: if necessary so as not to interrupt the normal conduct of business
where there is little risk of money laundering or terrorist financing

exception.description: By way of derogation from paragraph 1

task.label: Complete verification procedures as soon as practicable after initial contact

conditions.condition: where verification is allowed to be completed during the establishment of a business relationship

task.label: Allow the opening of an account with a credit institution or financial institution

conditions.condition: adequate safeguards in place to ensure that transactions are not carried out by the customer or on its behalf until full compliance with CDD requirements

exception.description: By way of derogation from paragraph 1

task.label: Require that obliged entities act when unable to comply with CDD requirements

conditions.condition: where an obliged entity is unable to comply with CDD requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)

task.label: Not carry out a transaction through a bank account

conditions.condition: where unable to comply with CDD requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)

exception.description: Does not apply to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors to the strict extent that they ascertain the legal position of their client or defend or represent that client in judicial proceedings

conditions.condition: where unable to comply with CDD requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)

exception.description: Does not apply to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors to the strict extent that they ascertain the legal position of their client or defend or represent that client in judicial proceedings

conditions.condition: where unable to comply with CDD requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)

exception.description: Does not apply to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors to the strict extent that they ascertain the legal position of their client or defend or represent that client in judicial proceedings

conditions.condition: where unable to comply with CDD requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)

exception.description: Does not apply to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors to the strict extent that they ascertain the legal position of their client or defend or represent that client in judicial proceedings

task.label: Consider making a suspicious transaction report to the FIU

conditions.condition: where unable to comply with CDD requirements laid down in point (a), (b) or (c) of the first subparagraph of Article 13(1)

exception.description: Does not apply to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors to the strict extent that they ascertain the legal position of their client or defend or represent that client in judicial proceedings

task.label: Not apply the first subparagraph to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors

conditions.condition: only to the strict extent that those persons ascertain the legal position of their client or perform the task of defending or representing that client in or concerning judicial proceedings, including providing advice on instituting or avoiding such proceedings

task.label: Require that obliged entities apply CDD measures to new and existing customers
Apply CDD measures to new and existing customers on a risk-sensitive basis

conditions.condition: at appropriate times to existing customers on a risk-sensitive basis, including at times when the relevant circumstances of a customer change
